selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 皇帝, 君主
words.definition: n. the male ruler of an empire

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 法院, 庭院, 奉承；vt. 献殷勤, 追求, 招致
words.definition: n. an assembly (including one or more judges) to conduct judicial business

words.translation: a. 人造的, 假的, 非原地产的
words.definition: a. contrived by art rather than nature

words.translation: n. 心, 心脏, 中心, 内心, 感情, 精神, 心情, 宝贝儿；vt. 鼓励
words.definition: n. the locus of feelings and intuitions

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: a. 真的, 真实的, 实际的, 实在的, 不动(产)的, 实数的；n. 实数, 现实
words.definition: a. being or occurring in fact or actuality; having verified existence; not illusory; not ghosts"

words.translation: n. 死亡
words.definition: n. the event of dying or departure from life

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 傍晚, 晚间, 末期
words.definition: n. the latter part of the day (the period of decreasing daylight from late afternoon until nightfall)

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲
words.definition: n. an artistic form of auditory communication incorporating instrumental or vocal tones in a structured and continuous manner

words.translation: n. 厨房, 全套炊具
words.definition: n. a room equipped for preparing meals

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: a. 金的, 含金的, 金色的, 贵重的, 繁盛的
words.definition: s. marked by peace and prosperity

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: n. 女孩, 少女, 女佣
words.definition: n. a young woman

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的
words.definition: n. all of something including all its component elements or parts

words.translation: n. 宫, 宫殿, 华丽大厦
words.definition: n. a large and stately mansion

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: n. 安静, 闲适, 平静；a. 安静的, 静止的, 寂静的, 朴素的, 从容的, 暗中的
n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: v. 读, 阅读, 理解；a. 有学问的
words.definition: v. interpret something that is written or printed

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者
words.definition: a. no longer having or seeming to have or expecting to have life

words.translation: vt. 放置, 产, 铺设, 布置, 提出, 平息；vi. 下蛋, 打赌
words.definition: v. put in a horizontal position

words.translation: a. 困难的
words.definition: a. not easy; requiring great physical or mental effort to accomplish or comprehend or endure

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: a. 帝王的, 宗主国的, 至尊的, 壮丽的；n. 特等品
words.definition: a. relating to or associated with an empire

words.translation: n. 文本, 正文, 课文, 主题, 圣经文句, 乐谱

words.translation: n. 影像, 肖像, 想象, 图像, 形象, 翻版；vt. 作...的像, 反映, 想象, 象征
words.definition: n. an iconic mental representation

words.translation: n. 头衔, 名称, 标题, 书名, 扉页, 权利, 资格, 冠军, 字幕；vt. 授予头衔, 加标题于
words.definition: n. a heading that names a statute or legislative bill; may give a brief summary of the matters it deals with

words.translation: n. 城市, 市
words.definition: n. a large and densely populated urban area; may include several independent administrative districts

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: a. relatively deep or strong; affecting one deeply

words.translation: a. 重的, 巨大的, 沉重的, 笨重的, 过度的；adv. 沉重地
words.definition: a. of comparatively great physical weight or density

words.translation: n. 成功, 成就, 胜利
words.definition: n. an event that accomplishes its intended purpose

words.translation: n. 工作, 运转, 劳动；a. 工作的, 劳动的, 经营的, 抽搐的, 运转的

words.translation: prep. 在...之中
words.definition: prep. Alt. of Amongst

words.translation: n. 艺术, 人文科学, 技术, 巧妙, 诡计, 美术
words.definition: n. the products of human creativity; works of art collectively

words.translation: n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养

words.translation: vt. 记得, 回忆起, 记住, 铭记, 纪念；vi. 记得

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的

words.translation: a. 高兴的, 喜欢的, 满足的

words.translation: n. 甜蜜, 糖果, 情人；a. 甜的, 芳香的, 悦耳的, 漂亮的, 和蔼的, 不咸的, 灵活的, 轻快的

words.definition: v. know and comprehend the nature or meaning of
